review_execution.reviewed_input: Provided git diff for RP00.P02.M01.S02 implementation plus validation summary; no Claude tools were available.

findings.title: Mixed tab/space indentation introduced into validator string-presence arrays
findings.description: Claude flagged tab/space indentation churn in validator string-presence arrays.
findings.recommendation: Re-indent the affected lines with spaces.

findings.title: S02 closeout evidence files not yet written
findings.description: Claude noted the expected closeout blocker: RP00.P02.M01.S02 evidence files were not written at review time.
findings.recommendation: Write command evidence, Claude review evidence, adjudication, and construction inspection, then re-run RP00 validation.

findings.title: Fail-closed tests assert only that an Error is thrown, not the specific cause
findings.description: Negative test cases verify an Error is thrown but do not pin every expected message.
findings.recommendation: Optionally pin targeted failure messages in a later hardening slice.
findings.deferred_to: future control-plane test-hardening slice after RP00.P02.M01.S02 closeout

findings.title: Normalizer trusts upstream tenant equality without re-checking carried tenant IDs
findings.description: The normalizer intentionally relies on M00 S03 and defers plan_authoring-specific tenant equality enforcement to RP00.P02.M01.S03 while service execution remains disabled.
findings.recommendation: Ensure RP00.P02.M01.S03 performs the tenant equality precheck before any future service logic permission.

parsed_review.summary: Claude reviewed RP00.P02.M01.S02 as a pure, deterministic, frozen-output transform over an M00 S03 allow_metadata_only precheck result. It found no P0/P1 blockers and confirmed no service execution, runtime route creation, product-state writes, or contract-row drafting.
parsed_review.residual_risk: Remaining risk is procedural and deferred-boundary only: the S02 evidence must exist and RP00.P02.M01.S03 must perform the next tenant-boundary check before any future service logic can execute.
